glosses.vi: tìm kiếm thông tin; điều tra

translations.en: My research is taking longer today.
translations.es: Hoy mi investigación está tardando más.
translations.fr: Mes recherches prennent plus de temps aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi la mia ricerca richiede più tempo.
translations.ko: 오늘 제 조사가 더 오래 걸려요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天的研究花的时间更长。
translations.yue: 我今日做研究要花多啲時間。
translations.ru: Сегодня моё исследование занимает больше времени.
translations.pt: Minha pesquisa está demorando mais hoje.
translations.he: המחקר שלי לוקח היום יותר זמן.
translations.vi: Hôm nay việc nghiên cứu của tôi mất nhiều thời gian hơn.
translations.hi: आज मेरी रिसर्च में ज्यादा समय लग रहा है.
translations.el: Σήμερα η έρευνά μου παίρνει περισσότερο χρόνο.
translations.nb: Forskningen min tar lengre tid i dag.
translations.id: Riset saya hari ini memakan waktu lebih lama.
translations.sv: Min forskning tar längre tid i dag.
translations.ro: Cercetarea mea durează mai mult astăzi.
translations.da: Min forskning tager længere tid i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は調べ物に時間がかかっています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Recherche'; feminine nominative singular; 1st person singular possessor.
Common noun; head of the subject NP; feminine nominative singular.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; sets time reference to 'today'.
Comparative degree adverb from 'lang'; modifies 'dauert' to express increased duration.

sentences.target: Die Recherche für das Referat ist fast fertig.
sentences.reading: /diː ʁeˈʃɛʁʃə fyːɐ̯ das ʁefeˈʁaːt ɪst fast ˈfɛʁtɪç./

translations.de: Die Recherche für das Referat ist fast fertig.
translations.ipa: /diː ʁeˈʃɛʁʃə fyːɐ̯ das ʁefeˈʁaːt ɪst fast ˈfɛʁtɪç./
translations.en: The research for the presentation is almost done.
translations.es: La investigación para la presentación está casi lista.
translations.fr: Les recherches pour l’exposé sont presque terminées.
translations.it: La ricerca per la presentazione è quasi finita.
translations.zh-Hans: 做报告的研究差不多完成了。
translations.yue: 做報告嘅資料搜集差唔多完成咗。
translations.pt: A pesquisa para a apresentação está quase pronta.
translations.vi: Nghiên cứu cho bài thuyết trình gần như xong.
translations.nl: Het onderzoek voor de presentatie is bijna klaar.
translations.hu: A prezentációhoz szükséges kutatás majdnem kész.
translations.hi: प्रेजेंटेशन के लिए रिसर्च लगभग पूरी हो गई है.
translations.pl: Badania do prezentacji są prawie gotowe.
translations.el: Η έρευνα για την παρουσίαση είναι σχεδόν έτοιμη.
translations.nb: Forskningen til presentasjonen er nesten ferdig.
translations.sv: Forskningen till presentationen är nästan klar.
translations.ro: Cercetarea pentru prezentare eίvai aproape gata.
translations.cs: Výzkum k prezentaci je téměř hotový.
translations.da: Forskningen til præsentationen er næsten færdig.
translations.ja: 発表のためのリサーチはほぼ終わりました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner for 'Recherche' (subject).
Common noun; head of the subject NP; feminine nominative singular.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces PP of purpose/topic ('für das Referat').
Definite article; neuter accusative singular; determiner for 'Referat' (object of 'für').
Common noun; neuter accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.
Copular auxiliary; present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate adjective.
Degree adverb modifying 'fertig'; expresses approximation.
Predicative adjective serving as subject complement (predicate) with 'ist'.

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns nach der Recherche im Café.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfn̩ ʊns naːx deːɐ̯ ʁeˈʃɛʁʃə ɪm kaˈfeː./

translations.de: Wir treffen uns nach der Recherche im Café.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfn̩ ʊns naːx deːɐ̯ ʁeˈʃɛʁʃə ɪm kaˈfeː./
translations.en: We’ll meet after the research at the café.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el café después de la investigación.
translations.fr: On se retrouve au café après les recherches.
translations.it: Ci vediamo al bar dopo la ricerca.
translations.zh-Hans: 研究结束后我们在咖啡馆见面。
translations.yue: 做完研究之後我哋喺咖啡店見面。
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar no café depois da pesquisa.
translations.vi: Sau khi nghiên cứu xong, chúng ta gặp nhau ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar in het café na het onderzoek.
translations.hu: A kutatás után találkozunk a kávézóban.
translations.hi: रिसर्च के बाद हम कैफ़े में मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotkamy się w kawiarni po badaniach.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε στο καφέ μετά την έρευνα.
translations.nb: Vi møtes på kafé etter forskningen.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di kafe setelah riset.
translations.sv: Vi ses på kafé efter forskningen.
translations.ro: Ne vedem la cafenea după cercetare.
translations.cs: Po výzkumu se sejdeme v kavárně.
translations.da: Vi mødes på café efter forskningen.
translations.ja: 調べが終わったらカフェで会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person plural; used reflexively/reciprocally with 'uns'.
Personal/reflexive pronoun; 1st person plural accusative; reflexive/reciprocal object of 'treffen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces temporal PP 'nach der Recherche'.
Definite article; feminine dative singular; determiner for 'Recherche' (object of 'nach').
Common noun; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach'.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); governs dative; introduces locative PP 'im Café'.
Common noun; neuter dative singular (licensed by 'im'); object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Lara startet morgen die Recherche zum Thema.
sentences.reading: /ˈlaːʁa ˈʃtaʁtət ˈmɔʁɡn̩ diː ʁeˈʃɛʁʃə tsʊm ˈteːma./

translations.de: Lara startet morgen die Recherche zum Thema.
translations.ipa: /ˈlaːʁa ˈʃtaʁtət ˈmɔʁɡn̩ diː ʁeˈʃɛʁʃə tsʊm ˈteːma./
translations.en: Lara starts the research on the topic tomorrow.
translations.es: Lara empieza mañana la investigación sobre el tema.
translations.fr: Lara commence la recherche sur le sujet demain.
translations.it: Lara inizia domani la ricerca sull’argomento.
translations.ko: 라라가 내일 그 주제에 대한 조사를 시작해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 拉拉明天开始做这个主题的研究。
translations.yue: Lara聽日開始做呢個主題嘅研究。
translations.ru: Лара завтра начнёт исследование по этой теме.
translations.pt: Lara começa amanhã a pesquisa sobre o tema.
translations.he: לארה מתחילה מחר את המחקר על הנושא.
translations.tr: Lara yarın konuyla ilgili araştırmaya başlayacak.
translations.vi: Lara sẽ bắt đầu nghiên cứu về chủ đề đó vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: لارا ستبدأ غدًا البحث حول الموضوع.
translations.nl: Lara begint morgen met het onderzoek naar het onderwerp.
translations.uk: Лара завтра починає дослідження на цю тему.
translations.hu: Lara holnap elkezdi a kutatást a témában.
translations.hi: लारा कल इस विषय पर रिसर्च शुरू करेगी.
translations.pl: Lara jutro zaczyna badania nad tym tematem.
translations.el: Η Λάρα ξεκινά αύριο την έρευνα για το θέμα.
translations.nb: Lara starter i morgen på forskningen om temaet.
translations.id: Lara akan mulai riset tentang toпиk itu besok.
translations.sv: Lara börjar i morgon med forskningen om ämnet.
translations.ro: Lara începe mâine cercetarea pe această temă.
translations.cs: Lara zítra začne výzkum na toto téma.
translations.da: Lara starter i morgen med forskningen om emnet.
translations.fi: Lara aloittaa huomenna tutkimuksen tästä aiheesta.
translations.ja: ララは明日そのテーマのリサーチを始めます。

tokens.explanation: Proper name; subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates future time.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner for the direct object 'Recherche'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'startet'.
Contracted preposition ('zu dem'); governs dative; introduces PP 'zum Thema' modifying 'Recherche' (topic).
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of 'zum'.
